input.hiring_signal_brief: Hiring for DevOps and cloud infrastructure roles on LinkedIn; no layoffs or funding news.
input.bench_summary: 1 senior DevOps engineer with HIPAA experience available in 5 days

candidate_output: Hi Lena, we connect healthtech companies with elite DevOps engineers who know HIPAA compliance inside and out. We’ve got someone ready to onboard in 5 days. Let’s talk about how we can help you scale securely.
